---
title: "Lady Maria Henrietta Scott"
---

## Lady Maria Henrietta Scott

**Dates:** (d. 1912)

### Description

daughter of the 3rd Earl of Clonmell

### Biography

She married (1864) the Hon. George Fitzclarence (1836-1894).

### Letters

- Letter from October 1, 1857

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
